privileged_info_summary: This task is based on the official Google 'Room with a View' Android Architecture Components codelab. The task involves converting three specific Java classes (Word.java, WordDao.java, WordViewModel.java) to Kotlin while preserving Room annotations (@Entity, @Dao, etc.) and keeping three other files (WordRepository.java, WordRoomDatabase.java, MainActivity.java) as Java. The project structure is synthetic and created within the task setup. All library versions are real and contemporary: Room 2.6.1, Kotlin 1.9.22 (released Dec 2023), Gradle 8.2 (Feb 2024), Android Gradle Plugin 8.2.0 (Nov 2023). The package path specified is 'com.example.roomwordsample', which differs from the official codelab's 'com.example.android.roomwordssample'. The verifier checks file conversion completion, content validity, clean state (original Java files removed, untouched files remain Java), and successful project build.
